name: DoorDash
analysis: DASH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $173.4600, stop $144.6489, target $191.0800 (0.61:1) — then trail it.
